text:
Northwind Logistics — Leadership Team

Ingrid Halvorsen — HR Director
Ingrid joined Northwind in April after five years leading people teams at a pan-European 3PL. She shares hiring updates at https://www.linkedin.com/in/ingrid-halvorsen-hr.

Samuel Osei, Chief Financial Officer
Samuel recently discussed scaling finance operations across borders on the FreightTech Radio podcast.

Petra Novak - Head of IT
Petra owns warehouse systems, integrations and security.

Lena Fischer — VP Operations
Lena runs our cross-dock network across France, Germany and the UK.

General enquiries: info@northwindlogistics.com
Direct: i.halvorsen@northwindlogistics.com | samuel@northwindlogistics.com

Northwind News

March — Northwind Logistics closes a EUR 40M Series B to expand its European cross-dock network.

We currently have 18 open roles across our Lyon, Hamburg and Manchester hubs — see careers.

Our people stack: Northwind runs HR and device management on Rippling today; payroll is processed in-country.
